steps.title: Use the contrast with little notice
steps.content: The word though sets up a contrast. Studies of high altitude must be described as plentiful because the effect of below-sea-level locations has received comparatively little notice.

steps.title: Choose the abundance word
steps.content: Choice A means early or incomplete, Choice C means occasional, and Choice D means ambiguous. None of those creates the contrast with comparatively little notice. The remaining word means abundant or plentiful. The answer is B.
